command: Build the board described in SPEC.md. Create or replace workspace/board.html. Use the verify_board tool repeatedly until it passes. When the board passes, reply DONE.
command_text: term-llm ask --no-session --text --stats --yolo --provider claude-bin:haiku --max-turns 30 --agent ./agent --read-dir . --write-dir ./workspace -f ./SPEC.md "Build the board described in SPEC.md. Create or replace workspace/board.html. Use the verify_board tool repeatedly until it passes. When the board passes, reply DONE."
prompt: Build the board described in SPEC.md. Create or replace workspace/board.html. Use the verify_board tool repeatedly until it passes. When the board passes, reply DONE.

stats.raw: Stats: 29.1s (llm 27.6s + tool 1.5s) | 30 in (cache: 36k read) → 4.2k out (last: 15k→45) | 2 tools | 3 llm calls
